SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_HUAGU_MIANZHANG_P: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_HUJIN_HUYUAN_POWE: At the start of each turn, gain a random [blue]{MinDex}[/blue]-[blue]{MaxDex}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_TROUBLE_AGAIN_POW: When [green]{TargetName}[/green]'s [gold]Weak[/gold] ends, add [gold]Table Flip[/gold] to your hand.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_SERVANT_PO: At the start of each turn, add {GeneratedCard} to your hand.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_NEUTRAL_AM: Whenever you draw [gold]Giant Rock[/gold], play it on a random enemy.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_SENTRY_POW: Cards with "Strike" in their name deal [blue]1[/blue] additional damage.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_TWO_WORD_P: At the start of each turn, {TargetingDescription} deal [blue]{SnapshotDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_JIAOBING_POWER.de: At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_BURNING_POWER.des: Burning creatures take damage at the start of their turn. Each turn, Burning has a [blue]{ClearChance}%[/blue] chance to be cleared. If not cleared, this chance increases by [blue]25%[/blue].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_BURNING_POWER.sma: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn, take|its turn, takes} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, then [gold]Burning[/gold] has a [blue]{ClearChance}%[/blue] chance to be cleared. If not cleared, this chance increases by [blue]25%[/blue].
